pocketlogR 0.1.0
  • Reference

Create a new flow

Source: R/flows.R
pl_create_flow.Rd

Registers a new flow in PocketBase. Errors if a flow with the same name already exists. Validates that depends_on flows exist and that adding them would not create a cycle in the DAG.

Usage

pl_create_flow(
  conn,
  name,
  type,
  owner,
  description = NULL,
  schedule = NULL,
  depends_on = NULL
)

Arguments

conn

A connection object from pl_connect().

name

Unique flow identifier (e.g. "ectrl_data_load").

type

Flow type string. See pl_flow_types for defaults, but any string is accepted.

owner

Free-text owner or responsible party (e.g. "quinten", "team-data").

description

Optional human-readable description.

schedule

Optional cron expression or human-readable schedule string.

depends_on

Optional character vector of upstream flow names.

Value

Invisibly returns the created flow record as a list.

Examples

if (FALSE) { # \dontrun{
conn <- pl_connect()
pl_create_flow(conn, "ectrl_data_load", type = "data_job", owner = "quinten",
               description = "Daily EUROCONTROL data import",
               schedule = "0 6 * * *")
} # }
